items.title: Buttermilk Cloud
items.description: A tall, flaky classic with cultured butter, sea salt, and a soft honey finish.
items.photoAlt: Stack of golden biscuits on a plate

items.title: Berry Jam Pocket
items.description: Tender biscuit folded around raspberry preserves and brushed with lemon glaze.
items.photoAlt: Fresh baked pastries with a golden crust

items.title: Cheddar Chive
items.description: Sharp cheddar, garden chives, cracked pepper, and crisp edges from the hot tray.
items.photoAlt: Savory baked bread rolls in a basket

items.title: Cinnamon Sugar
items.description: Warm spice, vanilla sugar, and a buttery crumb made for coffee and quiet minutes.
items.photoAlt: Sweet baked goods dusted with sugar

items.title: Smoked Maple
items.description: Maple glaze, smoked salt, and crisp laminated layers with a gentle savory note.

items.title: Strawberry Cream
items.description: Split biscuit, whipped vanilla cream, and spooned strawberries from the morning batch.
items.photoAlt: Fresh bakery dessert with fruit and cream

items.title: Country Sourdough
items.description: Slow-fermented loaf with a crisp crust, open crumb, and a mild tang.
items.photoAlt: Round sourdough loaf on a cutting board

items.title: Seeded Wheat
items.description: Whole wheat loaf with toasted sunflower, sesame, and flax seeds.
items.photoAlt: Fresh baked loaves on a bakery table

items.title: Milk Bread
items.description: Soft pull-apart loaf with a tender crumb and lightly sweet finish.

items.title: Morning Buns
items.description: Laminated rolls with cinnamon sugar, citrus zest, and crisp caramelized edges.
items.photoAlt: Golden sweet buns on a tray

items.title: Lemon Tea Cake
items.description: Bright lemon loaf cake with a soft crumb and simple vanilla glaze.

items.title: Savory Galette
items.description: Buttery pastry filled with seasonal vegetables, herbs, and aged cheese.
